basicInfo.name: Nightmare Vanessa
basicInfo.flavor: Vanessa studied magic on her own and became the master of time. She managed to return to the present day with her father's help, but decades had passed since she disappeared.

Normal Attack.desc:
Single Enemy
 - Deals damage equal to 100% of Magic Attack 1 time(s).
Skill Enhancement Effect
 - Increases Damage: To 100% of Physical Attack.

Skill 1.name: Sandstorm
Skill 1.desc:
3 Enemies
 - Deals Piercing damage equal to 95% of Magic Attack 2 time(s).
 - 100% chance to inflict Petrify. [Duration: 2 Turn(s)]
Skill Enhancement Effect
 - Increases Damage: To 95% of Physical Attack.

Skill 2.name: Waves of Sand
Skill 2.desc:
All Enemies
 - Deals damage equal to 70% of Magic Attack 2 time(s).
 - 100% chance to inflict Petrify. [Duration: 2 Turn(s)]
Skill Enhancement Effect
 - Increases Damage: To 70% of Physical Attack.

Passive.name: Mage of the Desert
Passive.desc:
Self
 - Grants All Damage Immunity. [Duration: 2 Turn(s)]
 - All Enemies
 - Inflicts Defense Reduction. [Always Active]

profile.story:
Vanessa brims with energy and positivity. She has a rare aptitude for time magic.
When she was young, she snuck into the Windringer family home's underground vault and activated a sealed time spell, triggering a time magic accident.
She was stuck wandering various timelines from the far past to the far future until her father brought her back to the current timeline.
However, in her 15 year absence from the current timeline, her body had not aged one bit. She uses magic to appear a similar age to that her friends Rachel and Eileene.
Upon her return, Vanessa was hunted by shadows from the Abyss for causing a twist in the timeline.
With Yeonhee's help, she became one of the Dimension Keepers tasked with managing the myriad of timelines and dimensions. Now, she travels from dimension to dimension trying to fix the timelines that have gone awry.
